creator: richard2891@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 203653
svn patch

Auto IP address detection does not work.

Freeswitch can't start SIP profiles on freebsd because the auto ip address detection does not work. So you have to statically set it under Freeswitchs global variable see this link.

https://freeswitch.org/confluence/display/FREESWITCH/local_ip_v4

Well this works and fix the issues I spent a lot of time trying to find out why my freeswitch setup was not working. I had never used freeswitch before and was thinking it was an problem with my setup.

Some weeks later I found that this bug to do with freeswitch and FreeBSD was reported to freeswitch team. see this link 

https://freeswitch.org/jira/browse/FS-10581

this details the bug and give the fix but freeswitch still has not resolved it.

So I recreated the patch and rebuilt and tested it with the current ports verstion of freeswitch and it resolved the problem with out have to set it in the freeswitch global variables.

I have attached the required svn patch to update the port with this patch. As was detailed in the porters-handbook under 11.1. Using Subversion to Make Patches.

If there are any issues or concerns let me know.
